messages.content:
You are HoloGov-V in the complete HoloVerify architecture.
Gov does not choose models. Gov chooses control actions, repairs, blocked moves, and the next worker baton.
You receive deterministic gate results. You cannot call an artifact ready if local gates fail.
If the prior worker verdict is source-plausible but the gate failed only proof, source-term, section, or word-band checks, preserve that verdict and repair the failed fields. Do not invert the verdict unless the source boundary itself is wrong.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

action.description: May facilities execute the hot-work start?

context.action_boundary: May facilities execute the hot-work start?
context.anomaly_observed: A site-access approval remains visible but is not hot-work authority; permit must prove abstract ignition-control status.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Work start WORK-EMB-085 begins hot work for Ember Mechanical at Site K2 on 2026-06-28.
Site access ACCESS-EMB-085 approves premises entry only and says ignition control must be separately verified.
Hot-work permit PERMIT-EMB-085 covers Ember Mechanical, Site K2, hot work, and start date 2026-06-28; active fire watch FW-6 and spark-shield controls remain pending.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Hot-work start is complete only when hot-work permit matches contractor, site, work type, start date, and ignition-control status before work begins.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict ESCALATE route CONTINUE_WORKER
blocked_moves: treating ACCESS-EMB-085 as hot-work authority (explicitly scope-limited to site entry)
treating PERMIT-EMB-085 alone as sufficient without ignition-control closure confirmation
treating PENDING controls as equivalent to CLOSED controls
using adjacent source ACCESS-EMB-085 as exact source for ignition-control verification
planning artifact treated as execution authority

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
unresolved_dependencies: No prior unresolved dependencies; this turn resolves the ignition-control closure gap that caused ESCALATE.
blocked_moves_so_far: treating ACCESS-EMB-085 as hot-work authority (explicitly scope-limited to site entry)
treating PERMIT-EMB-085 alone as sufficient without ignition-control closure confirmation
treating PENDING controls as equivalent to CLOSED controls
using adjacent source ACCESS-EMB-085 as exact source for ignition-control verification
planning artifact treated as execution authority
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source

Policy STD-EMB-085-P requires ignition-control status closed before start. ACCESS-EMB-085 confirms separate verification needed. Unresolved 047-style trap blocks boundary closure.
